title: extract_reviews / extract_photos are honored by the worker but dropped by the typed results transform
summary: Setting extract_reviews / extract_photos makes the worker collect reviews[] and photos[] into the RAW job output, but GET /jobs/{id}/results maps each business through SpiderMapsBusiness, which has no reviews/photos field (no extra=allow) and transform_spidermaps_data never passes them — so the arrays are dropped from the records you read back. What survives reliably is reviews_count and image_url (the first photo). Don't promise the user review text or a photo gallery from the standard results endpoint.
references: workers/SpiderBrowser/result_formatter.py:44-52,222-224 — reviews/photos present in worker output when flags set
app/schemas/spidermaps.py:266-292 — SpiderMapsBusiness has NO reviews/photos field and no extra='allow'
app/api/v1/jobs/transforms.py:290-313 — transform_spidermaps_data builds SpiderMapsBusiness WITHOUT reviews/photos (only reviews_count + image_url survive)
